subject: mneme architecture
summary: Use an immutable semantic event ledger with derived current state.

semantic_delta.after: Continuity is captured as typed semantic state changes during the session.

why.trigger: Long sessions lose or distort distant context.

rationale.text: A fresh session must recover decisions and their reasons without replaying the full transcript.

consequences: Current state is rebuilt from the event ledger.

value.summary: Preserve the semantic reasons governing long workflows.
value.rationale: Fresh sessions must continue correctly without replaying full transcripts.

value.summary: Record semantic state changes in an append-only ledger.
value.rationale: Historical rationale must remain auditable and supersedable.
